eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 6:01 PM on JUL 10, 2026 Effective until 6:01 AM JUL 11, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire Alert - Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 3 GO NOW evacuation notice for zone JAC-148-A near 18000 block E Evans Creek Rd due to East Evans Creek rd FIre. Monitor local news sources for evacuations and incident information.
